eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Dewey, OK; at 12:53 PM ON MAR 22, 2026 Effective until 02:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
At 2:45 PM  a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control near Camargo spreading rapidly south. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY for Camargo. Those between E680 Rd and EW 69 should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings. Reunification Center is setting up at 604 Main St. Vici Community Center. 
Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
